ZSNAP_F01S_107.@DataWarehouse.businessDefinition.descri: Final open items processing layer. Filters for items open as of P_KeyDate and calculates human-readable aging bucket text labels (e.g., "0-30 Days") from net due interval parameters.
ZSNAP_F01S_107.@DataWarehouse.businessDefinition.purpos: Filters for open items as of key date and derives aging bucket text labels
ZSNAP_F01S_107.@DataWarehouse.tableFunction.script:
return select
	main.COMPANYCODE,
	main.FISCALYEAR,
	main.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENT,
	main.LEDGERGLLINEITEM,
	main.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTITEM,
	main.DOCUMENTITEMTEXT,
	main.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTCATEGORY,
	main.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTTYPE,
	main.INVOICEREFERENCE,
	main.INVOICEREFERENCETYPE,
	main.INVOICEITEMREFERENCE,
	main.INVOICEREFERENCEFISCALYEAR,
	main.DEBITCREDITCODE,
	main.CLEARINGJOURNALENTRY,
	main.CLEARINGJOURNALENTRYFISCALYEAR,
	main.CHARTOFACCOUNTS,
	main.CONTROLLINGAREA,
	main.FISCALYEARVARIANT,
	main.FINANCIALACCOUNTTYPE,
	main.CLEARINGDATE,
	main.POSTINGDATE,
	main.DOCUMENTDATE,
	main.DUECALCULATIONBASEDATE,
	main.CASHDISCOUNT1DAYS,
	main.CASHDISCOUNT1PERCENT,
	main.CASHDISCOUNT1DATE,
	main.CASHDISCOUNT2DAYS,
	main.CASHDISCOUNT2PERCENT,
	main.CASHDISCOUNT2DATE,
	main.DISCOUNTISAVAILABLE,
	main.CASHDISCOUNTMISSED,
	main.PAYMENTTERMS,
	main.PAYMENTBLOCKINGREASON,
	main.PAYMENTMETHOD,
	main.ISUSEDINPAYMENTTRANSACTION,
	main.TREASURYCONTRACTTYPE,
	main.POSTINGKEY,
	main.CLEARINGDATEVSDUEDATEOFFSET,
	main.PAYMENTTIMINGCATEGORY,
	main.NETDUEARREARSDAYSINT,
	main.NETDUEARREARSDAYS,
	main.DAYSOVERDUEINT,
	cast (cast (DAYSOVERDUEINT as NVARCHAR(15)) as NVARCHAR(15)) as DAYSOVERDUE,
	main.NETDUEDATE,
	main.SUPPLIER,
	main.PARTNERCOMPANY,
	main.GLACCOUNT,
	main.SPECIALGLCODE,
	main.COSTCENTER,
	main.PROFITCENTER,
	main.FUNCTIONALAREA,
	main.BUSINESSAREA,
	main.SEGMENT,
	main.PURCHASINGDOCUMENT,
	main.ASSIGNMENTREFERENCE,
	main.NETDUEINTERVALTEXT,
	main.ISCLEARED,
	main.ISOVERDUE,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
	main.AMOUNTINTRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
	main.CASHDISCOUNT1INTC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
	main.CASHDISCOUNT2INTC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
	main.AVAILABLEDISCOUNTINTC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
	main.MISSEDDISCOUNTINTC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
	main.CLAIMEDDISCOUNTINTC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
	main.OPENAMTINTRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
	main.PYCLEAREDINTRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	main.TRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'BalanceTransactionCurrency'*/
	main.AMOUNTINBALTC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'BalanceTransactionCurrency'*/
	main.CASHDISCOUNT1INBALTC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'BalanceTransactionCurrency'*/
	main.CASHDISCOUNT2INBALTC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'BalanceTransactionCurrency'*/
	main.AVAILABLEDISCOUNTINBALTC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'BalanceTransactionCurrency'*/
	main.MISSEDDISCOUNTINBALTC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'BalanceTransactionCurrency'*/
	main.CLAIMEDDISCOUNTINBALTC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'BalanceTransactionCurrency'*/
	main.OPENAMTINBALTC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'BalanceTransactionCurrency'*/
	main.PYCLEAREDINBALTC,
	main.BALANCETRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
	main.AMOUNTINCOMPANYCODECURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
	main.CASHDISCOUNT1INCC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
	main.CASHDISCOUNT2INCC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
	main.AVAILABLEDISCOUNTINCC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
	main.MISSEDDISCOUNTINCC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
	main.CLAIMEDDISCOUNTINCC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
	main.OPENAMTINCOMPANYCODECURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
	main.PYCLEAREDINCOMPANYCODECURRENCY,
	main.COMPANYCODECURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
	main.AMOUNTINGLOBALCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
	main.CASHDISCOUNT1INGC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
	main.CASHDISCOUNT2INGC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
	main.AVAILABLEDISCOUNTINGC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
	main.MISSEDDISCOUNTINGC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
	main.CLAIMEDDISCOUNTINGC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
	main.OPENAMTINGLOBALCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
	main.PYCLEAREDINGLOBALCURRENCY,
	main.GLOBALCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'DisplayCurrency'*/
	main.AMOUNTINDISPLAYCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'DisplayCurrency'*/
	main.CASHDISCOUNT1INDC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'DisplayCurrency'*/
	main.CASHDISCOUNT2INDC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'DisplayCurrency'*/
	main.AVAILABLEDISCOUNTINDC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'DisplayCurrency'*/
	main.MISSEDDISCOUNTINDC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'DisplayCurrency'*/
	main.CLAIMEDDISCOUNTINDC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'DisplayCurrency'*/
	main.OPENAMTINDISPLAYCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'DisplayCurrency'*/
	main.PYCLEAREDINDISPLAYCURRENCY,
	main.DISPLAYCURRENCY
from (
	select
		MAIN.COMPANYCODE,
		MAIN.FISCALYEAR,
		MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENT,
		MAIN.LEDGERGLLINEITEM,
		MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTITEM,
		MAIN.DOCUMENTITEMTEXT,
		MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTCATEGORY,
		MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTTYPE,
		MAIN.INVOICEREFERENCE,
		MAIN.INVOICEREFERENCETYPE,
		MAIN.INVOICEITEMREFERENCE,
		MAIN.INVOICEREFERENCEFISCALYEAR,
		MAIN.DEBITCREDITCODE,
		MAIN.CLEARINGJOURNALENTRY,
		MAIN.CLEARINGJOURNALENTRYFISCALYEAR,
		MAIN.CHARTOFACCOUNTS,
		MAIN.CONTROLLINGAREA,
		MAIN.FISCALYEARVARIANT,
		MAIN.FINANCIALACCOUNTTYPE,
		MAIN.CLEARINGDATE,
		MAIN.POSTINGDATE,
		MAIN.DOCUMENTDATE,
		MAIN.DUECALCULATIONBASEDATE,
		MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1DAYS,
		MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1PERCENT,
		MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1DATE,
		MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT2DAYS,
		MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT2PERCENT,
		MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT2DATE,
		MAIN.DISCOUNTISAVAILABLE,
		MAIN.CASHDISCOUNTMISSED,
		MAIN.PAYMENTTERMS,
		MAIN.PAYMENTBLOCKINGREASON,
		MAIN.PAYMENTMETHOD,
		MAIN.ISUSEDINPAYMENTTRANSACTION,
		MAIN.TREASURYCONTRACTTYPE,
		MAIN.POSTINGKEY,
		MAIN.CLEARINGDATEVSDUEDATEOFFSET,
		MAIN.PAYMENTTIMINGCATEGORY,
		MAIN.NETDUEARREARSDAYS as NETDUEARREARSDAYSINT,
		cast (MAIN.NETDUEARREARSDAYS as NVARCHAR(15)) as NETDUEARREARSDAYS,
		case
			when MAIN.NETDUEARREARSDAYS > 0 then MAIN.NETDUEARREARSDAYS
			else 0
		end as DAYSOVERDUEINT,
		MAIN.NETDUEDATE,
		MAIN.SUPPLIER,
		MAIN.PARTNERCOMPANY,
		MAIN.GLACCOUNT,
		MAIN.SPECIALGLCODE,
		MAIN.COSTCENTER,
		MAIN.PROFITCENTER,
		MAIN.FUNCTIONALAREA,
		MAIN.BUSINESSAREA,
		MAIN.SEGMENT,
		MAIN.PURCHASINGDOCUMENT,
		MAIN.ASSIGNMENTREFERENCE,
		NETDUEINTERVALDERIVE.NETDUEINTERVALTEXT,
		MAIN.ISCLEARED,
		case
			when MAIN.NETDUEARREARSDAYS < 0 then cast ('' as NVARCHAR(1))
			else 'X'
		end as ISOVERDUE,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
		MAIN.AMOUNTINTRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
		MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1INTC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
		MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT2INTC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
		MAIN.AVAILABLEDISCOUNTINTC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
		MAIN.MISSEDDISCOUNTINTC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
		MAIN.CLAIMEDDISCOUNTINTC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
		MAIN.OPENAMTINTRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
		MAIN.PYCLEAREDINTRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
		MAIN.TRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'BalanceTransactionCurrency'*/
		MAIN.AMOUNTINBALTC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'BalanceTransactionCurrency'*/
		MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1INBALTC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'BalanceTransactionCurrency'*/
		MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT2INBALTC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'BalanceTransactionCurrency'*/
		MAIN.AVAILABLEDISCOUNTINBALTC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'BalanceTransactionCurrency'*/
		MAIN.MISSEDDISCOUNTINBALTC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'BalanceTransactionCurrency'*/
		MAIN.CLAIMEDDISCOUNTINBALTC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'BalanceTransactionCurrency'*/
		MAIN.OPENAMTINBALTC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'BalanceTransactionCurrency'*/
		MAIN.PYCLEAREDINBALTC,
		MAIN.BALANCETRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
		MAIN.AMOUNTINCOMPANYCODECURRENCY,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
		MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1INCC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
		MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT2INCC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
		MAIN.AVAILABLEDISCOUNTINCC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
		MAIN.MISSEDDISCOUNTINCC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
		MAIN.CLAIMEDDISCOUNTINCC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
		MAIN.OPENAMTINCOMPANYCODECURRENCY,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
		MAIN.PYCLEAREDINCOMPANYCODECURRENCY,
		MAIN.COMPANYCODECURRENCY,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
		MAIN.AMOUNTINGLOBALCURRENCY,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
		MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1INGC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
		MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT2INGC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
		MAIN.AVAILABLEDISCOUNTINGC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
		MAIN.MISSEDDISCOUNTINGC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
		MAIN.CLAIMEDDISCOUNTINGC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
		MAIN.OPENAMTINGLOBALCURRENCY,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
		MAIN.PYCLEAREDINGLOBALCURRENCY,
		MAIN.GLOBALCURRENCY,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'DisplayCurrency'*/
		MAIN.AMOUNTINDISPLAYCURRENCY,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'DisplayCurrency'*/
		MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1INDC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'DisplayCurrency'*/
		MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT2INDC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'DisplayCurrency'*/
		MAIN.AVAILABLEDISCOUNTINDC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'DisplayCurrency'*/
		MAIN.MISSEDDISCOUNTINDC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'DisplayCurrency'*/
		MAIN.CLAIMEDDISCOUNTINDC,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'DisplayCurrency'*/
		MAIN.OPENAMTINDISPLAYCURRENCY,
		
		/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'DisplayCurrency'*/
		MAIN.PYCLEAREDINDISPLAYCURRENCY,
		MAIN.DISPLAYCURRENCY
	from ZSNAP_F01S_105(:P_SIGNAGE, :P_KEYDATE, :P_DISPLAYCURRENCY, :P_EXCHANGERATETYPE, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL1INDAYS, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL2INDAYS, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL3INDAYS, :P_NETDUEINTERVAL4INDAYS) as MAIN
	left outer join ZSNAP_F01G_NETDUEINTERVAL (
		TO_VARCHAR (:P_KEYDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'),
		:P_NETDUEINTERVAL1INDAYS,
		:P_NETDUEINTERVAL2INDAYS,
		:P_NETDUEINTERVAL3INDAYS,
		:P_NETDUEINTERVAL4INDAYS
	) as NETDUEINTERVALDERIVE on MAIN.NETDUEDATE = NETDUEINTERVALDERIVE.NETDUEDATE
) as main;
ZSNAP_F01S_107.@EndUserText.label: SNAP F01: Open Items Net Due Arrears 2

ZSNAP_F01S_F72105.@DataWarehouse.tableFunction.script:
return select
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENT,
	MAIN.COMPANYCODE,
	MAIN.FISCALYEAR,
	MAIN.LEDGER,
	MAIN.LEDGERGLLINEITEM,
	MAIN.SOURCELEDGER,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTTYPE,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTCATEGORY,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTITEM,
	MAIN.CLEARINGJOURNALENTRY,
	MAIN.CLEARINGJOURNALENTRYFISCALYEAR,
	MAIN.CLEARINGDATE,
	MAIN.SPECIALGLCODE,
	MAIN.BUSINESSAREA,
	MAIN.CHARTOFACCOUNTS,
	MAIN.CONTROLLINGAREA,
	MAIN.COSTCENTER,
	MAIN.DEBITCREDITCODE,
	MAIN.FINANCIALACCOUNTTYPE,
	MAIN.FUNCTIONALAREA,
	MAIN.GLACCOUNT,
	_GLACCOUNTINCHARTOFACCOUNTS.CORPORATEGROUPACCOUNT,
	_GLACCOUNTINCHARTOFACCOUNTS.CORPORATEGROUPCHARTOFACCOUNTS,
	MAIN.PROFITCENTER,
	MAIN.SIGNAGE,
	MAIN.FISCALYEARPERIOD,
	MAIN.FISCALYEARVARIANT,
	MAIN.SUPPLIER,
	_SUPPLIER.SUPPLIERACCOUNTGROUP,
	MAIN.SPECIALPERIOD,
	MAIN.FISCALPERIODENDDATE,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
	case
		when MAIN.SIGNAGE = 'A' then MAIN.ENDINGBALANCEAMTINTRANSCRCY
		else -MAIN.ENDINGBALANCEAMTINTRANSCRCY
	end as ENDINGBALANCEAMTINTRANSCRCY,
	MAIN.TRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
	case
		when MAIN.SIGNAGE = 'A' then MAIN.ENDINGBALANCEAMTINCOCODECRCY
		else -MAIN.ENDINGBALANCEAMTINCOCODECRCY
	end as ENDINGBALANCEAMTINCOCODECRCY,
	MAIN.COMPANYCODECURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
	case
		when MAIN.SIGNAGE = 'A' then MAIN.ENDINGBALANCEAMTINGLOBALCRCY
		else -MAIN.ENDINGBALANCEAMTINGLOBALCRCY
	end as ENDINGBALANCEAMTINGLOBALCRCY,
	MAIN.GLOBALCURRENCY
from ZSNAP_F01S_F72103(:P_SFROMFISCALYEAR, :P_STOFISCALYEARPERIOD, :P_SIGNAGE) as MAIN
left outer join ZSNAP_F01G_GLACCOUNTINCHARTOFACCOUNTS as _GLACCOUNTINCHARTOFACCOUNTS on MAIN.CHARTOFACCOUNTS = _GLACCOUNTINCHARTOFACCOUNTS.CHARTOFACCOUNTS and MAIN.GLACCOUNT = _GLACCOUNTINCHARTOFACCOUNTS.GLACCOUNT
left outer join ZSNAP_F01G_SUPPLIER as _SUPPLIER on MAIN.SUPPLIER = _SUPPLIER.SUPPLIER;
ZSNAP_F01S_F72105.@EndUserText.label: SNAP F72: Additional Field Derivation
